---
title: use-fmt-print
description: "Prefer fmt.Print over builtin print."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Prefer fmt.Print over builtin print. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
print(message)
```

## Good

```go
fmt.Print(message)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only use-fmt-print`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
